name: Three Cheese Vegetable Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions. Drain, then place in cold water until ready to use.
2. Drain VEG-ALL, reserving 1/2 cup liquid.
3. Melt butter in a saucepan; add onion and cook until soft.
4. Blend in flour. Gradually add reserved liquid and chicken broth. Cook and stir until thickened. Set sauce aside.
5. Make ricotta filling by combining 1 egg, ricotta cheese, parmesan cheese, nutmeg, and VEG-ALL.
6. Make spinach filling by adding 1/2 cup sauce and remaining egg to chopped spinach.
7. Layer in a lightly greased 13x9-inch baking dish. Place a little sauce in the bottom of the dish and cover with 3 noodles. Spread spinach filling, 1/2 cup sauce, and 1/2 cup parmesan cheese on top.
8. Layer 3 more noodles and spread VEG-ALL ricotta filling; top with 1/2 the mozzarella cheese and 1/2 cup parmesan cheese.
9. Cover with remaining 3 noodles and top with remaining sauce, mozzarella, and parmesan cheese.
10. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
